import React, { useState } from 'react'; import '../styles/ProfilePage.css'; export default function ProfilePage() { const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const [profile, setProfile] = useState({ name: '', email: '', bio: '', interests: '', joinDate: '', }); const handleChange = (field, value) => { setProfile({ ...profile, [field]: value }); }; const handleSave = () => { // TODO: Add actual save logic with backend console.log('Saving profile:', profile); setIsEditing(false); }; return (

{profile.name}

{profile.email}

{isEditing ? (
handleChange('name', e.target.value)} />
